name: 2026.13.2 (Plus 2)
body:
## SourceGit Plus v2026.13.2 (Plus 2)

### Fixes
* **Caption buttons** — minimize, maximize, and close buttons are now clickable across their full height (top edge no longer misses clicks on Windows with Avalonia 12).
* **Update check** — VERSION is synced with ``data/version.json`` so the app no longer prompts for an update when you are already on the latest Plus build.
* **Title bar hit-test** — ``ExtendClientAreaTitleBarHeightHint`` and title-bar roles adjusted for Avalonia 12 on Windows.

### Plus features (unchanged)
* Drag-and-Drop Local Changes
* Ahead/Behind counters on Pull/Push
* Direct Commit to Branch

---
Upstream base: v2026.13 — https://github.com/sourcegit-scm/sourcegit/releases/tag/v2026.13
